exception.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1089, 94). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.80) Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [cf1de7ea38cdfc5ad55a9d9f88f4c2bb, clickElement {id=f.7EAD9C47D9DAC1C2409C51199082A57A.d.15FA24E92D6E94989C872582E8E6F064.e.65}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.80, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\2475097\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:58045}, goog:processID: 3012, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58045/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.80, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (cf1de7ea38cdfc5ad55a9d9f88f4c2bb)] -> xpath: //a[@class='nav-icon-link']] Session ID: cf1de7ea38cdfc5ad55a9d9f88f4c2bb
